name: code-metrics-spreadsheet
description: Spreadsheet-like interface for analyzing C code metrics

scripts.serve: node -e "const http = require('http'); const fs = require('fs'); const server = http.createServer((req, res) => { if (req.url === '/') { res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': 'text/html'}); res.end(fs.readFileSync('metrics-report.html')); } else if (req.url === '/metrics.json') { res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}); res.end(fs.readFileSync('metrics.json')); } }); server.listen(3000, () => console.log('Metrics viewer at http://localhost:3000'));"
